title: Yoriichi type zero katana from anime Demon slayer
description: Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Yoriichi type zero katana from the anime Demon Slayer by renaming
body: OptiFine required! ( Rename Any sword to "Yoriichi type zero katana" to use it. ) For support, download this resource pack from my website: [yoriichi_type_zero_katana.zip](https://mineanimecreations.com/resource-pack/yoriichi_type_zero_katana.zip) Discord server: discord.gg/z86yJcAZKc. Also check out my other packs: https://modrinth.com/user/MineAnimeCreations Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Yoriichi type zero katana from the anime Demon Slayer by renaming
